data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for unified reporting, but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that all admissions roll up under the same offer/sellable identity. While there are successful bookings and a consolidated calendar state, there is no direct evidence showing that reporting is unified across all admission paths. The linked use case mentions unified reporting, but without concrete evidence of how this is implemented or verified, a gap remains in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: Lack of evidence demonstrating that all admissions are reported under the same offer/sellable identity.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
